ui.read_through_the_module_content_above: A cunglei i module thawngpang kha rel hnu ah, a tanglei i Complete kha nemh.
ui.realtime_calming_tools_for_inthemomen: A camo a camo bawmh nakhnga real-time daihter thilri hna
ui.record_sessions_with_the_session_data: Session Data Tracker hmang in session hna kha record tuah, asiloah Manual Entry mode ah thlen.
ui.remember_cultural_humility_is_a_lifel: Phildah: Hnamzia toidornak cu nunnak chung dihlak i hmuhmanhnak a si. Ruahnak pakhat cio nih nangmah cu a tlukpi i rian a tuamtu in a kan ser deuh.
ui.review_your_abc_data_collection_for_c: Na ABC data collection kha a dih le a thatzia caah review tuah
ui.select_a_research_design_to_structure: Na data khurhnak ser nakhnga research design pakhat thim
ui.share_workspace_data_with_team_member: Rianttuanmi hawile pawl he workspace data kha sem. Rian-tlam zohnak nih BCBA, sayahawi le nu le pa hna caah data kha a tlamtling deuh.
ui.speak_your_observations_naturally_ai_: Na zohchunhnak hna kha a hmaanmi in chim. AI nih na transcript chung in structured ABC entry hna kha a chuah ko lai.
ui.stepbystep_scripts_for_healing_relati: Pehtlaihnak damhter le khualbu sernak nakhnga kal lengmang script hna
ui.systematic_behavioral_measurement_acr: Session tampi chung i ziaza tahnak a hmaanmi
ui.systematic_reinforcer_identification_: Evidence-based protocol hmang in reinforcer thlahnak a hmaanmi
ui.tap_each_item_when_student_engages_wi: Sianginngakchia nih a hmuhmanh tikah thil pakhat cio kha nemh
ui.track_behavior_frequency_over_time_wi: Aim line, phase thlennak, le trend lehhnak he caan ah ziaza frequency kha track tuah.
ui.track_behaviors_at_home_using_simple_: Innchung ah a tlempal le nifa cio holh hmang in ziaza hna kha track tuah. Hi nih na fapa\
ui.track_your_feelings_earn_badges_and_b: Na lungput hna track tuah, badge hmuh, le streak hna ser!
ui.transform_deficitbased_language_into_: Tlawmnak-hmuhnak holh kha thiltawng-hmuhnak chimnak ah lehrual
ui.type_or_paste_your_observation_notes_: Nifa cio English in na zohchunhnak notes hna kha ttial asiloah paste tuah. AI nih ABC entry a hmaanmi in a ser lai.
ui.use_these_criteria_when_examining_you: Na graph kha na zoh tikah hi criteria hi hmang:
ui.use_this_flow_to_hypothesize_the_func: Harnak ziaza pakhat function kha ruah nakhnga hi flow hi hmang.
ui.visual_multitiered_system_of_supports: Visual multi-tiered bawmhnak system. Sianginngakchia hna kha tier ah pe, AI-bawmh placement biaknemhnak hmu.
add_notes_hint: A cunglei ah notes thlah asiloah aw chimnak nakhnga mic hmang
correlation_desc: Cell a mawi deuhmi nih trigger le ziaza karlak i pehtlaihnak fak deuh kha a langhter
no_session_notes: Session notes a um rih lo
toast_workspace_saved: Workspace cu file ah khoh a si 💾

raw.adjust_the_plan_based_on_data_trends: Data trend ah zoh in plan kha thlennak tuah
raw.assign_an_ioa_partner_for_reliabilit: Zumhmi check nakhnga IOA partner pek
raw.assign_team_roles_and_responsibiliti: Team rian le rian-mawhmawhpinak hna pek
raw.build_smart_goals_from_analysis: Lehhnak in SMART tinhmi hna ser
raw.compare_current_data_to_baseline_lev: Tuchan data kha baseline level he tah
raw.compare_student_performance_to_peer_: Sianginngakchia tuannak kha peer norm he tah
raw.complete_at_least_3_observation_sess: A tlawmpa bik 3 voi zohchunhnak session dih
raw.conduct_a_full_functional_behavior_a: Functional Behavior Assessment kim in tuah
raw.confirm_hypothesis_with_the_team_or_: Team asiloah rianttuanpi he hypothesis hmaanter
raw.confirm_two_observers_could_agree_on: Zohchunhtu pahnih nih chuaknak kong ah an lung an tlin khawh ti hmaanter
raw.develop_an_individualized_behavior_i: Mipa cio Behavior Intervention Plan ser
